BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Mid-month working notes for John on the Market Street lease renewal and the $85K ADAS decision. Market St bay run-rate ~$880K/yr. Totowa true burn is $4,200/mo (Rosa mid-month note), not the stale $3,000/mo from the Q3 close. ADAS payback: $85,000 / ($8,160/mo retained margin) = 10.4 months. Draft for Angela Russo (CPA) review.

CurrentState.Note: Revenue line: MembershipDues.Total = Market Street bay monthly run-rate (~$880K/yr / 12). EquipmentSales = ADAS retained margin ($8,160/mo). InstructorPay_Raj = biweekly technician payroll. Supplies = parts; Marketing = Oct customer-appreciation spend. Totowa location burns $4,200/mo (freshest figure).

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Landlord renewal offer: rent +12% to $19.04/sqft = $10,155/mo
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: At ~$880K/yr Market St run-rate, $10,155/mo = 13.8% rent-to-revenue - under the 15% ceiling. Corridor comps average $19.20/sqft; landlord's $24/sqft claim is unanchored. Counter around +6%. The $1,088/mo rent delta is covered by ~4 additional ADAS calibrations/mo at $340 retained margin.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Walk-away line: rent at $20.30/sqft = $130K/yr = $10,833/mo
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: This is the walk-away threshold ($130,000/yr = 15% rent-to-revenue on the ~$880K bay run-rate). The $1,766/mo delta needs ~6 extra calibrations/mo to absorb. Above $20.30/sqft, relocate to a corridor alternative.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Counter the lease around +6% with a hard walk-away at $20.30/sqft ($130K/yr = 15% rent-to-revenue). Totowa's real burn is $4,200/mo, not $3,000. Separate capex: $85K Bosch ADAS pays back in ~10.4 months at 24 calibrations/mo x $340 retained margin ($8,160/mo).
ActionItems: Confirm 24 calibrations/mo with Hector before committing $85K to ADAS
Reconcile Totowa burn with Luis; freshest figure is $4,200/mo
